title: Narayana Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Subject Matter Expert in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
